claim_shape: BROAD MECHANICAL CLAIM THAT FAILS TO LIMIT OVER PRIOR ART OR RECONCILE TECHNICAL CONTRADICTIONS (E.G., OMITS LEVEL-OF-ORDINARY-SKILL OBVIOUSNESS ANALYSIS, SPECIFICALLY AVOIDS DISTINGUISHING CRITICAL LIMITING PARAMETERS)
remedy: ADD PRECISE TECHNICAL CONSTRAINTS OR UNEXPECTED RESULTS THAT REFLECT NON-OVIOUSNESS, SPECIFICALLY LIMITING PARAMETERS THAT ARE NOT DISCLOSED OR MOTIVATED IN PRIOR ART
